identity.descriptionZh: Apple 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕消费品牌、媒体内容、高级质感、电商零售组织页面。
identity.descriptionEn: Consumer electronics. Premium white space, SF Pro, cinematic imagery.

display.description: Apple 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕消费品牌、媒体内容、高级质感、电商零售组织页面。
display.descriptionEn: Consumer electronics. Premium white space, SF Pro, cinematic imagery.

shadows.label: 阴影 1 - Shadow 1
shadows.description: Density is unusually low even by contemporary SaaS standards. Each tile occupies roughly one viewport, and there is no decorative chrome — no borders, no gradients, no decorative frames, no shadows on headlines. Elevation appears only when a product image rests on a surface (a single soft `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22) 3px 5px 30px` drop for visual weight). The result is a catalog that feels more like a museum gallery: the wall disappears and the artifact takes over.

shadows.label: 阴影 2 - Shadow 2
shadows.description: Focus Blue (`{colors.primary-focus}` — #0071e3): A marginally brighter sibling of Action Blue, reserved for the keyboard focus ring on buttons (`outline: 2px solid`).

shadows.label: 阴影 3 - Shadow 3
shadows.description: Divider Soft (`{colors.divider-soft}` — #f0f0f0): The "border" tone on secondary buttons — functions as a ring shadow rather than a hard line. In production, often applied as `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)`.

shadows.label: 阴影 4 - Shadow 4
shadows.description: | Product shadow | `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22) 3px 5px 30px 0` | Product renders resting on a surface (the only true "shadow" in the system) |

borders.label: 边框 3 - Border 3
borders.description: | Soft hairline | 1px `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)` border | Utility cards, sub-nav frosted-glass separator |

panels.title: 第一眼识别明确
panels.body: 适合消费品牌、电商、媒体和产品展示页。

panels.title: 颜色与字体可复用
panels.body: 页面从本地 metadata 与 Design.md 提取 palette、typography 和标签，用于快速预览主题质感。

panels.title: 面向真实界面片段
panels.body: 按钮、输入、卡片和间距样例保持克制，便于比较不同主题的系统性差异。

do: 建议：Use {colors.primary} (Action Blue #0066cc) for every interactive element — links, pill CTAs, focus signals — and nothing else. The single accent is non-negotiable。
建议：Set headlines in {typography.hero-display} or {typography.display-lg} with negative letter-spacing ({-0.28 → -0.374px}) to get the signature "Apple tight" cadence。
建议：Run body copy at {typography.body} (17px / 400 / 1.47 / -0.374px) — not 16px. The extra pixel defines the brand's reading pace。
建议：Alternate {component.product-tile-light} (or parchment) and {component.product-tile-dark} for full-bleed section rhythm. The color change IS the divider。
建议：Reserve {rounded.pill} for the primary blue CTA and any other element that should read as an "action" (configurator chips, search input, sticky bar CTA)。
dont: 避免：introduce a second accent color; every "click me" signal is {colors.primary} (Action Blue)。
避免：add shadows to cards, buttons, or text — shadow is reserved for product imagery。
避免：use gradients as decorative backgrounds; atmosphere comes from photography。
避免：set body copy at weight 500 — Apple's ladder is 300 / 400 / 600 / 700, with 500 deliberately absent. Body is always 400; strong inline is 600; display is 600。
避免：round full-bleed tiles — tiles are rectangular and edge-to-edge; the color change is the divider。
